comments.body:
## WS6-b DONE — live dogfood through Gerrit verified (2026-07-01)
CONTRIBUTING.md landed THROUGH Gerrit as change 121: push refs/for/main → LLM-Review (4 patchsets,
findings remediated) → +1, 0 unresolved → submit → merged (Gerrit main a6f690de) → replicated to
GitHub main after the WS7 lock enabled the deploy key. Change URL:
https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/121 . Full detail on WS7 (1bd2).

compiled_state.description:
# WS6-b — Gerrit LLM-Review dogfood proof (live AWS/Gerrit)

## Why
The epic's dogfood success criterion: rebar's own changes are reviewed and gated end-to-end
through Gerrit's `LLM-Review` label on the real, deployed environment. This is deliverable *b* —
the only part that requires the live AWS/Gerrit + rebar-MCP deployment (d251) and CANNOT be
satisfied offline. Split from WS6-a (the voter integration + stub tests, which is closeable
without the live env).

## What
- Deploy the WS6-a voter into the rebar-MCP receiver on the provisioned AWS/Gerrit environment,
  activate it for the rebar project via the `[gerrit_voter]` staged opt-in, and drive at least one
  real rebar change through `patchset-created → four-pass gate → LLM-Review vote → submit`.

## Scope
- IN: the live deployment + activation + the recorded end-to-end proof.
- OUT: the voter code + stub tests (WS6-a, done offline).

## Dependencies / boundary
- **BLOCKED on the deployed AWS/Gerrit + rebar-MCP environment** (provisioned by epic d251). This
  ticket is not closeable from a local checkout with no Gerrit credentials/endpoint — it is the
  genuine live-integration boundary. Do NOT force-close it as a proxy for the offline work; that
  belongs to WS6-a.
- depends_on WS6-a (the voter must exist first).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The WS6-a voter is deployed + activated for the rebar Gerrit project (`gerrit_voter.enabled=true`, project allow-listed).
- [ ] At least one real rebar change is reviewed + gated end-to-end on the live AWS/Gerrit environment: `patchset-created` → four-pass gate → `LLM-Review` vote → submit (or veto).
- [ ] The proof is recorded on this ticket: the change URL + the resulting `LLM-Review` vote + the robot comment.
compiled_state.title: WS6-b: Gerrit LLM-Review dogfood proof (live AWS/Gerrit)
